overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character in a beige jacket walking through a rainy urban night scene. The character navigates wet sidewalks, passes pedestrians carrying umbrellas, and crosses a busy intersection with active vehicle traffic and red traffic lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with parked vintage cars and street lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right-side sidewalk, passing parked vehicles and approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: police officer standing next to a black sedan parked on the curb

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection
white striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
police officer in dark uniform standing by the black vehicle
black sedan parked at the curb with doors closed
vintage yellow car parked along the street
tall street light casting yellow illumination through the rain
overhead utility wires crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk at night, passing a police officer standing next to a black car. Vintage vehicles are parked along the curb, and street lamps cast a yellow glow through the heavy rain. The traffic light ahead shows red, and power lines stretch across the dark sky.

events.description: character walks under striped storefront awning, gaining shelter from the heavy rain

agents.ego_description: walking under the protection of a striped awning, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a black umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: green and white striped canvas awning extending over the sidewalk
blue vintage sedan parked along the curb
green vintage car parked near the intersection
red metal trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character moves under a striped green and white awning that provides shelter from the rain. A pedestrian with a black umbrella walks past in the opposite direction. Additional vintage cars in blue and green are parked along the curb, and a red trash can stands near the corner as the character approaches the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and active traffic

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
vehicles stop at the red light while pedestrians with umbrellas cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide wet street at the crosswalk alongside multiple pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella crossing the street alongside the character

entered.detail: large brick industrial building with tall chimney across the intersection
brown sedan waiting at the red traffic light

segments.scene_description: The character steps out from under the awning and crosses the wide intersection at the crosswalk. The traffic light shows red for vehicles, and several pedestrians with umbrellas cross together. A large industrial building with a chimney dominates the view across the street, while cars wait at the light. The wet asphalt reflects the street lights and vehicle headlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk on opposite side of intersection with commercial buildings

events.description: character reaches the opposite sidewalk after crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk on the opposite side of the street, moving away from the intersection

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with illuminated green signage

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the new sidewalk with a brick building on the right featuring air conditioning units. The industrial building is now visible to the left across the street, and a commercial building with green neon signage appears in the distance ahead. The rain continues to fall as the character moves deeper into the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban night, transitioning from a quiet sidewalk to a busy intersection and into a commercial district. It begins with the character walking past a police officer and vintage cars under the yellow glow of street lamps and heavy rain. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts under a striped green and white awning where a pedestrian with an umbrella passes by, leading toward a red trash can at the corner. The camera then follows the character as they step back into the rain to cross a wide intersection, where wet asphalt reflects the headlights of cars waiting at a red light beneath a towering industrial building. Finally, the view opens up onto a new sidewalk lined with brick buildings and air conditioning units, moving toward a distant commercial structure marked by green neon signage.
